item.title: A New Spot Doing All-Day Sonoran Hot Dogs With a Mob of Tacos
item.description:
In addition to two trompos, there are lorenzas, caramelos, campechanos, seafood tacos, taquitos, and “gringo” tacos, plus $4 street tacos, rib eye tacos, surf n’ turf tacos, and several varieties of vegetarian tacos. In summation: a whole lotta tacos.

item.title: Inflation tops 4% for the first time in 3 years on spike in gasoline prices
item.description: Inflation has surged to its highest level in more than three years since the U.S. and Israel launched their war on Iran, triggering a surge in gasoline prices.
item.source:markdown: Inflation has surged to its highest level in more than three years since the U.S. and Israel launched their war on Iran, triggering a surge in gasoline prices.

item.title: Israeli leader who pulled out of Lebanon warns against getting stuck again
item.description: Ehud Barak withdrew Israeli forces from Lebanon in 2000, ending an occupation that lasted nearly two decades. He says that was a quagmire Israel shouldn't repeat.
item.source:markdown: Ehud Barak withdrew Israeli forces from Lebanon in 2000, ending an occupation that lasted nearly two decades. He says that was a quagmire Israel shouldn't repeat.

item.title: ICE denies having a protester database. But a letter to Congress sheds more light
item.description: In a previously unpublicized letter, the newly-departed head of ICE said the agency collects data on people suspected of potentially unlawful activity.
item.source:markdown: In a previously unpublicized letter, the newly-departed head of ICE said the agency collects data on people suspected of potentially unlawful activity.

item.title: With Phillips 66 oil refinery closing, some South Bay residents worry they’re being left out

item.title: Spending recs for $3.7 million recovered from Andrew Do scheme to be up to his successor

item.title: Gay in a Macho Latino World: Why I Defend Pride
item.description:
Growing up in an old, beaten-up apartment complex near Disneyland, I came of age in an environment that demonized queerness. Not only through verbal reprimands, machismo, and shaming, but also through violent means.

Jay Obernolte (R-CA-23) introduced the Disaster Ready Infrastructure Act, legislation which requires state Departments of Transportation and Metropolitan Planning Organizations to identify roads, bridges, and other transportation assets that are particularly vulnerable to natural disasters, as well as those that are essential to emergency operations […]

item.title: Meet the team that brings color to the Metro system
item.description: By 5:30 a.m. every morning, Metro’s painters are already on the move.    They gather at Metro’s maintenance and support facility on Pacific Boulevard in Vernon – the team’s home base – where they review assignments, load trucks with supplies and prepare for a day that could take them almost anywhere in the Metro system.    Some will head out to train stations, while others may work at […]

item.title: U.S. Space Force Issues Request For Information For SLC-9 To Expand Launch Capabilities At VSFB
item.description: The U.S. Space Force at Vandenberg Space Force Base has issued a Request for Information (RFI) to identify industry launch service providers interested in obtaining a real property use agreement to finance, design, construct, operate and maintain small or medium vertical space launch capabilities to provide space launch services to the Department of War, non-DoW Federal, and other commercial entities at an area identified as Space Launch Complex-9 (SLC-9).
item.source:markdown: The U.S. Space Force at Vandenberg Space Force Base has issued a Request for Information (RFI) to identify industry launch service providers interested in obtaining a real property use agreement to finance, design, construct, operate and maintain small or medium vertical space launch capabilities to provide space launch services to the Department of War, non-DoW Federal, and other commercial entities at an area identified as Space Launch Complex-9 (SLC-9).
